content_body:
November 2021 ~ Rented this perfect cabin for a 3 night long weekend. it's absolutely beautiful. Came with my wife, my cousin, his wife, and his two little kids. Had a blast. Used basically ALL this cabin had to offer, including the hot tub! Our only regret is we couldn't stay longer!!! Place decorated beautifully, every room has everything needed + more! 

Thanks to the owners and property management company for their efforts in this place!! We will be back!! ~ Charlotte, NC
title: Best Blue Ridge Property Management Company
